name: Low-Fat Rice Krispies-Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, cream cheese, and sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg beaters (egg substitute) and vanilla. Beat well. Add the flour mixture, stirring until combined. Stir in rice krispies and reduced-fat chocolate chips.
3. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto baking sheets coated with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove immediately from baking sheets and cool on wire racks. Store in an airtight container.
